title: The Lowmark Guild Shipment
target: escort a Lowmark Merchant Guild caravan past the Black Hill toll-gang — they remember the company that turned the gang loose two seasons ago

slots.description: ride point with the caravan-master; stand if they stand
negotiate with the toll-gang's headman before steel comes out
ride ahead, mark the ambush spots before the wagons reach them

factionContext.summary: the merchant guild that holds the salt-roads ledger; a clean run earns them owing you
the toll-gang; spilling their blood costs you their forbearance on later jobs
